zh.lifeSummary: 當Elen verch Rees Lloyd於1520年出生在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根爾時，她的父親Lewis ap Rees Lloyd30歲，母親Gladys Henry-1歲。她於1540年與Jenkin Franklen在威爾士格拉莫爾根結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1557年在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根高維爾享年37歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根斯萊德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elen verch Rees Lloyd于1520年出生在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根爾时，她的父亲Lewis ap Rees Lloyd30岁，母亲Gladys Henry-1岁。她于1540年与Jenkin Franklen在威尔士格拉莫爾根结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1557年在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根高維爾享年37岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根斯萊德。

nameMeanings.name: Lloyd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: descriptive nickname from Welsh llwyd ‘gray’. InWelsh the color term llwyd also includes shades of brown, andit is likely that, when used with reference to younger men,llwyd denoted brown or mouse-colored hair.

nameMeanings.name: Elen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Helen , now also used outside Wales. It is identical with the Welsh vocabulary word elen ‘nymph’, but this is unlikely to be the origin. It is found in Welsh texts from an early period as an equivalent of Helen, for example as the name of the mother of Constantine, finder of the True Cross.

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Rees
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Welsh Rhys, in some cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the Welsh given name.

variants.name: Reese
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Rhys . The name is now in widespread and frequent use outside Wales, in many cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the given name.

variants.name: Rhys
meanings: Traditional name meaning ‘ardour’; borne in the Middle Ages by various rulers in south-west Wales, including  Rhys ap Tewdur  (  d. 1093 ) and  Rhys ap Gruffudd  (  1132–97 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Elen verch Rees Lloyd was born in 1520, in Gwyr, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Lewis ap Rees Lloyd, was 30 and her mother, Gladys Henry, was -1. She married Jenkin Franklen in 1540, in Glamorgan, Wales. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1557, in Gower, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 37, and was buried in Slade, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elen verch Rees Lloyd est née en 1520, à Gwyr, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lewis ap Rees Lloyd, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Gladys Henry, avait -1 ans. Elle a épousé Jenkin Franklen en 1540, à Glamorgan, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1557, à Gower, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterrée à Slade, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elen verch Rees Lloyd 1520 in Gwyr, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lewis ap Rees Lloyd 30 und ihre Mutter Gladys Henry -1. Sie hat 1540 in Glamorgan, Wales Jenkin Franklen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1557 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Gower, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Slade, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Elen verch Rees Lloydが1520年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガングウイルで生まれた時，父Lewis ap Rees Lloydは30歳，母Gladys Henryは-1歳であった。1540年にウェールズグラモーガンでJenkin Franklenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1557年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンゴウエルで37歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズグラモーガンスラドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elen verch Rees Lloyd(이)가 1520년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 그w이르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lewis ap Rees Lloyd(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gladys Henry(은)는 -1세였다. 그녀는 1540년 웨일스 글램르건에서 Jenkin Franklen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1557년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 가워에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 글램르건 슬라드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elen verch Rees Lloyd родилась в 1520 г. в местности гвир, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Lewis ap Rees Lloyd было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Gladys Henry, -1. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jenkin Franklen в 1540 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1557 г. в местности гоуир, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 37 лет и была похоронена в местности слад, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания.

Se casó con Jenkin Franklen en 1540, en Glamorgan, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1557, en Gower, Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultada en Slade, Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido.
